title: Diagnose and fix warthog z-order bug

log.context: Diagnose and fix warthog z-order bug

Done. Here's what was wrong and what was fixed:

**Root cause:** The previous fix (`drawForegroundTiles`) correctly redraws tree/rock tile shapes on top of the warthog after it's drawn, but was incomplete. Tree tiles (type 4) and rock tiles (type 5) in `drawMap` **do not fill a grass background** before drawing their shapes — they draw only the trunk/canopy and rock pixels onto a transparent tile cell in the mapCache. Since the main canvas is never cleared between frames, those transparent non-s...(truncated)
